form.formComment: Placed last time (19.37) at Healesville in a Grade 4/5, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and six places from 10 starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a scorching early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at Warrnambool clocking 22.02. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.84) at this track in a Special conditions Veteran race, finishing third and beaten 4.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from nine starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 16.89 over 300m at Healesville. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.
